TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == pisiwgacuan nu Huy-li-pin ŤŹ≤ŚĺčŤ≥ďśė•ÁĮÄ == pisiwgacuan nu Huy-li-pin sipanganganaca tu sakayliwmah nu pisiwgacuan atu Taywan nu pisiwgacuan, u Hua-zen angangan nu lala a lisinan. ina lisin malalamel tu Taywan nu lalangawan atu Huy-li-pin nu lalangawan, ayda han tu malatidaay tu nu kanatal a binacadan tu pulung a lalangawan. sakay Hua-zen atu Huy-li-pin a kalasiwbayan tu nikacacubelisan taneng sipakayda tu likisi milalaba katukuh tu cay sep secian, tawya misiwbayay nu Hua-zen u kaysing atu dawa ku sapaliyun tu itidaay a udu' atu pawti ku sapisiwbayan. 1594 mihcaan, u sakakaay nu Si-pan-ya sakasiwa nu Cung-tu ci Lu-yi-se. Pei-lei-se. Ta-se-ma-li-ni-ya patideng tu Min-lun-luo niyadu'an, malamabulaway nu Hua-zen a niyadu'an, u satenesay nu kanatal a Tang-zen-cie. . itini nu likisian mapalalid nu taydaay a tademaw, u ten-su-kiw namin ku Huy-li-pin tademawan, pikulisimasean u angangan sa, mikilul tu Hua-zen tu nipatidengan, pisiwgacuan han tu u sakaetiman tu a demiad. masasuala tu yadahay nu lalangawan i Huy-li-pin, amica ku nikayadah nu ten-su-kiw ku binacadan, nika pisiwgacuan micumud tu i biyubiyuan atu micumud i kiwkay pahung pakalemed tu katuuday nu binacadan. . tabakiay nu lisin atu kapulungan nu kawaw Ś§ßŚěčśÖ∂ŚÖłŤąáŚÖ¨ŚÖĪśīĽŚčē Huy-li-pin pasu Ma-ni-la, Su-u, Ta-wuo nu macian itida ipisiwgacuan sikawaw tu yadahay nu kapulungan a kawaw nupilisinan. . nipisabangcal tu patiyamay. Ť°óť†≠Ť£Ěť£ĺ tabakiay nu kasiwacahan a lamal. Ś§ßŚěčÁÖôÁĀęŤ°®śľĒ sibaluay tu miliwliway nu kadideng atu misalangsayay. ŤäĪŤĽäŚ∑°ťĀäŤąáŤąěťĺćŤąěÁćÖ cacay nu lasubuan nu limulak. ÁôĺŚģ∂ÁÜĪť¨ß lalay pilisinan ÁĮÄśÖ∂ÁŅíšŅó miasik tu anabuh atu misabaluhay mikayzu. ťô§Ś°ĶŤąáŤ£Ěť£ĺ hungsuy, pilecuhan tu aadupan atu patudung tu babalai. ťĘ®śįī,ÁĒüŤāĖŤąáÁ•≠Á•Ė milikeluh tu kapahay a lemed. ŤŅéŚ•ĹťĀč lalangawan tu kanť£≤ť£üśĖáŚĆĖ itida i Huy-li-pin, kalabian nu pisigacuan u sakaetiman nu kawawan. hatidaay tu kadahay nu nikalalid nu lalangawan, itakal nu kalabian idaw ku " Cung-Huy malamelay nu kan". kukuy atu piyeng : u makimulmulay nu sicedamay a kukuyan u sakay pisiwgacuan nu Huy-li-pin tu kakanen, imi hantu u sakalimulak nu lalabu nu luma' " kapahkapah ku nikaudip". tidaay nu tademawan u salang nu abinung ku sasangaan, idaw ku sumanahay nu wanengan, kiyukiyuan nu tubah atu bangsisay nu lutukan a bangsis. kukuy sipasip i ti'kuk miciyan, malaasu'ay nu sicedamay nu zayliw. Kuy-sung-sen idaw ku micidekay nu sicedan mahida u tubah a nikasumadan sa. piyeng han makinamulmul ku kaku imi han yadahen ku kalibuwa sa. . tuwami, suyceiw atu tabuan nanay : piciyanan tu tuwami nu Huy-li-pin, mapulung tu nu Cung-kuo atu Si-pan-ya a nisalamian, tanayu ku tawmi mahida u tanayuay anikaudipan. suyceiw atu nitabuan mahida ku kaku tu papadengan tu kalisiw atu kim, mahida u siidaay. ťļĶśĘĚ, . mantaay a lami': u niilangan tu belac maltatipeluk mitabu tu ningzeng atu bitukul atu udang a sapian nu lamian. makimulmulay nu heci: pisiwgacuan kanca itida i takal u caayay ka linuk u " unglay" a padingad atu masahicahicaay nu imian " ma'dem tu" a makimulmulay nu hecian. sa, idaw henay ku picidekan tu kan nu i takalay i Huy-li-pin: kalabian tawya, kanca walau aca ku nipatata tu lamian, sakay siida sa; u liwan tu kalabian a kanen tu sakatusa nu demiadan, imi sa " samihmihcaan sa siliwan". ÁĒüŤŹúŚĆÖ: ".
S.PHON: == pisiwga ¶uan nu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin ***** == pisiwga ¶uan nu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin sipaŇčaŇčana ¶a tu sakajr~…ĺiwmańß nu pisiwga ¶uan atu tajwan nu pisiwga ¶uan, u ńßua-z…ôn aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa a r~…ĺisinan. ina r~…ĺisin mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu tajwan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ajda ńßan tu mar~…ĺatidaaj tu nu kanatar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan tu pur~…ĺuŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. sakaj ńßua-z…ôn atu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin a kar~…ĺasiwbajan tu nika ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺisan tan…ôŇč sipakajda tu r~…ĺikisi mir~…ĺar~…ĺaba katukuńß tu ¶aj s…ôp s…ô ¶ian, tawja misiwbajaj nu ńßua-z…ôn u kajsiŇč atu dawa ku sapar~…ĺijun tu itidaaj a udu Ē~ ° atu pawti ku sapisiwbajan. **** mińß ¶aan, u sakakaaj nu si-pan-ja sakasiwa nu ¶uŇč-tu ¶i r~…ĺu-ji-s…ô. p…ôi-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô. ta-s…ô-ma-r~…ĺi-ni-ja patid…ôŇč tu min-r~…ĺun-r~…ĺuo nijadu Ē~ °an, mar~…ĺamabur~…ĺawaj nu ńßua-z…ôn a nijadu Ē~ °an, u sat…ôn…ôsaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a taŇč-z…ôn- ¶i…ô. . itini nu r~…ĺikisian mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu tajdaaj a tad…ômaw, u t…ôn-su-kiw namin ku ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin tad…ômawan, pikur~…ĺisimas…ôan u aŇčaŇčan sa, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ńßua-z…ôn tu nipatid…ôŇčan, pisiwga ¶uan ńßan tu u saka…ôtiman tu a d…ômiad. masasuar~…ĺa tu jadańßaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan i ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin, ami ¶a ku nikajadańß nu t…ôn-su-kiw ku bina ¶adan, nika pisiwga ¶uan mi ¶umud tu i bijubijuan atu mi ¶umud i kiwkaj pańßuŇč pakar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd tu katuudaj nu bina ¶adan. . tabakiaj nu r~…ĺisin atu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu kawaw ********* ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin pasu ma-ni-r~…ĺa, su-u, ta-wuo nu ma ¶ian itida ipisiwga ¶uan sikawaw tu jadańßaj nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kawaw nupir~…ĺisinan. . nipisabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu patijamaj. **** tabakiaj nu kasiwa ¶ańßan a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. ****** sibar~…ĺuaj tu mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj nu kadid…ôŇč atu misar~…ĺaŇčsajaj. ********* ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺasubuan nu r~…ĺimur~…ĺak. **** r~…ĺar~…ĺaj pir~…ĺisinan **** miasik tu anabuńß atu misabar~…ĺuńßaj mikajzu. ***** ńßuŇčsuj, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu aadupan atu patuduŇč tu babar~…ĺai. **,***** mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu kapańßaj a r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd. *** r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tu kan**** itida i ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin, kar~…ĺabian nu pisiga ¶uan u saka…ôtiman nu kawawan. ńßatidaaj tu kadańßaj nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, itakar~…ĺ nu kar~…ĺabian idaw ku " ¶uŇč-ńßuj mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu kan". kukuj atu pij…ôŇč : u makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu si ¶…ôdamaj a kukujan u sakaj pisiwga ¶uan nu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin tu kakan…ôn, imi ńßantu u sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺak nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " kapańßkapańß ku nikaudip". tidaaj nu tad…ômawan u sar~…ĺaŇč nu abinuŇč ku sasaŇčaan, idaw ku sumanańßaj nu wan…ôŇčan, kijukijuan nu tubańß atu baŇčsisaj nu r~…ĺutukan a baŇčsis. kukuj sipasip i ti Ē~ °kuk mi ¶ijan, mar~…ĺaasu Ē~ °aj nu si ¶…ôdamaj nu zajr~…ĺiw. kuj-suŇč-s…ôn idaw ku mi ¶id…ôkaj nu si ¶…ôdan mańßida u tubańß a nikasumadan sa. pij…ôŇč ńßan makinamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku kaku imi ńßan jadańß…ôn ku kar~…ĺibuwa sa. . tuwami, suj ¶…ôiw atu tabuan nanaj : pi ¶ijanan tu tuwami nu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin, mapur~…ĺuŇč tu nu ¶uŇč-kuo atu si-pan-ja a nisar~…ĺamian, tanaju ku tawmi mańßida u tanajuaj anikaudipan. suj ¶…ôiw atu nitabuan mańßida ku kaku tu papad…ôŇčan tu kar~…ĺisiw atu kim, mańßida u siidaaj. **, . mantaaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °: u niir~…ĺaŇčan tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺtatip…ôr~…ĺuk mitabu tu niŇčz…ôŇč atu bitukur~…ĺ atu udaŇč a sapian nu r~…ĺamian. makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu ńß…ô ¶i: pisiwga ¶uan kan ¶a itida i takar~…ĺ u ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺinuk u " uŇčr~…ĺaj" a padiŇčad atu masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu imian " ma Ē~ °d…ôm tu" a makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu ńß…ô ¶ian. sa, idaw ńß…ônaj ku pi ¶id…ôkan tu kan nu i takar~…ĺaj i ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin: kar~…ĺabian tawja, kan ¶a war~…ĺau a ¶a ku nipatata tu r~…ĺamian, sakaj siida sa; u r~…ĺiwan tu kar~…ĺabian a kan…ôn tu sakatusa nu d…ômiadan, imi sa " samińßmińß ¶aan sa sir~…ĺiwan". ***: ".
S.FORM: == pisiwgacuan nu Huy-li-pin ŤŹ≤ŚĺčŤ≥ďśė•ÁĮÄ == pisiwgacuan nu Huy-li-pin sipanganganaca tu sakayliwmah nu pisiwgacuan atu Taywan nu pisiwgacuan, u Hua-zen angangan nu lala a lisinan. ina lisin malalamel tu Taywan nu lalangawan atu Huy-li-pin nu lalangawan, ayda han tu malatidaay tu nu kanatal a binacadan tu pulung a lalangawan. sakay Hua-zen atu Huy-li-pin a kalasiwbayan tu nikacacubelisan taneng sipakayda tu likisi milalaba katukuh tu cay sep secian, tawya misiwbayay nu Hua-zen u kaysing atu dawa ku sapaliyun tu itidaay a udu' atu pawti ku sapisiwbayan. 1594 mihcaan, u sakakaay nu Si-pan-ya sakasiwa nu Cung-tu ci Lu-yi-se. Pei-lei-se. Ta-se-ma-li-ni-ya patideng tu Min-lun-luo niyadu'an, malamabulaway nu Hua-zen a niyadu'an, u satenesay nu kanatal a Tang-zen-cie. . itini nu likisian mapalalid nu taydaay a tademaw, u ten-su-kiw namin ku Huy-li-pin tademawan, pikulisimasean u angangan sa, mikilul tu Hua-zen tu nipatidengan, pisiwgacuan han tu u sakaetiman tu a demiad. masasuala tu yadahay nu lalangawan i Huy-li-pin, amica ku nikayadah nu ten-su-kiw ku binacadan, nika pisiwgacuan micumud tu i biyubiyuan atu micumud i kiwkay pahung pakalemed tu katuuday nu binacadan. . tabakiay nu lisin atu kapulungan nu kawaw Ś§ßŚěčśÖ∂ŚÖłŤąáŚÖ¨ŚÖĪśīĽŚčē Huy-li-pin pasu Ma-ni-la, Su-u, Ta-wuo nu macian itida ipisiwgacuan sikawaw tu yadahay nu kapulungan a kawaw nupilisinan. . nipisabangcal tu patiyamay. Ť°óť†≠Ť£Ěť£ĺ tabakiay nu kasiwacahan a lamal. Ś§ßŚěčÁÖôÁĀęŤ°®śľĒ sibaluay tu miliwliway nu kadideng atu misalangsayay. ŤäĪŤĽäŚ∑°ťĀäŤąáŤąěťĺćŤąěÁćÖ cacay nu lasubuan nu limulak. ÁôĺŚģ∂ÁÜĪť¨ß lalay pilisinan ÁĮÄśÖ∂ÁŅíšŅó miasik tu anabuh atu misabaluhay mikayzu. ťô§Ś°ĶŤąáŤ£Ěť£ĺ hungsuy, pilecuhan tu aadupan atu patudung tu babalai. ťĘ®śįī,ÁĒüŤāĖŤąáÁ•≠Á•Ė milikeluh tu kapahay a lemed. ŤŅéŚ•ĹťĀč lalangawan tu kanť£≤ť£üśĖáŚĆĖ itida i Huy-li-pin, kalabian nu pisigacuan u sakaetiman nu kawawan. hatidaay tu kadahay nu nikalalid nu lalangawan, itakal nu kalabian idaw ku " Cung-Huy malamelay nu kan". kukuy atu piyeng : u makimulmulay nu sicedamay a kukuyan u sakay pisiwgacuan nu Huy-li-pin tu kakanen, imi hantu u sakalimulak nu lalabu nu luma' " kapahkapah ku nikaudip". tidaay nu tademawan u salang nu abinung ku sasangaan, idaw ku sumanahay nu wanengan, kiyukiyuan nu tubah atu bangsisay nu lutukan a bangsis. kukuy sipasip i ti'kuk miciyan, malaasu'ay nu sicedamay nu zayliw. Kuy-sung-sen idaw ku micidekay nu sicedan mahida u tubah a nikasumadan sa. piyeng han makinamulmul ku kaku imi han yadahen ku kalibuwa sa. . tuwami, suyceiw atu tabuan nanay : piciyanan tu tuwami nu Huy-li-pin, mapulung tu nu Cung-kuo atu Si-pan-ya a nisalamian, tanayu ku tawmi mahida u tanayuay anikaudipan. suyceiw atu nitabuan mahida ku kaku tu papadengan tu kalisiw atu kim, mahida u siidaay. ťļĶśĘĚ, . mantaay a lami': u niilangan tu belac maltatipeluk mitabu tu ningzeng atu bitukul atu udang a sapian nu lamian. makimulmulay nu heci: pisiwgacuan kanca itida i takal u caayay ka linuk u " unglay" a padingad atu masahicahicaay nu imian " ma'dem tu" a makimulmulay nu hecian. sa, idaw henay ku picidekan tu kan nu i takalay i Huy-li-pin: kalabian tawya, kanca walau aca ku nipatata tu lamian, sakay siida sa; u liwan tu kalabian a kanen tu sakatusa nu demiadan, imi sa " samihmihcaan sa siliwan". ÁĒüŤŹúŚĆÖ: ".

misar~…ĺaŇčsajaj. ********* ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺasubuan nu r~…ĺimur~…ĺak. **** r~…ĺar~…ĺaj pir~…ĺisinan **** miasik tu anabuńß atu misabar~…ĺuńßaj mikajzu. ***** ńßuŇčsuj, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu aadupan atu kadańßaj nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, itakar~…ĺ nu kar~…ĺabian idaw ku " ¶uŇč-ńßuj mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu kan". kukuj atu pij…ôŇč : u makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu si ¶…ôdamaj a kukujan u sakaj ¶id…ôkaj nu si ¶…ôdan mańßida u tubańß a nikasumadan sa. pij…ôŇč ńßan makinamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku kaku imi ńßan jadańß…ôn ku kar~…ĺibuwa sa. . tuwami, suj ¶…ôiw atu tabuan nanaj : pi ¶ijanan tu tuwami nu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin, mapur~…ĺuŇč tu nu ¶uŇč-kuo atu si-pan-ja a nisar~…ĺamian, tanaju ku tawmi mańßida u tanajuaj anikaudipan. suj ¶…ôiw atu nitabuan mańßida ku kaku tu papad…ôŇčan tu kar~…ĺisiw atu kim, mańßida u siidaaj. **, . mantaaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °: u niir~…ĺaŇčan tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺtatip…ôr~…ĺuk mitabu tu niŇčz…ôŇč atu bitukur~…ĺ atu udaŇč a sapian nu r~…ĺamian. makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu ńß…ô ¶i: pisiwga ¶uan kan ¶a itida i takar~…ĺ u ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺinuk u " uŇčr~…ĺaj" a padiŇčad atu masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj nu imian " ma Ē~ °d…ôm tu" a makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu ńß…ô ¶ian. sa, idaw ńß…ônaj ku pi ¶id…ôkan tu kan nu i takar~…ĺaj i ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin: kar~…ĺabian tawja, kan ¶a war~…ĺau a ¶a ku nipatata tu r~…ĺamian, sakaj siida sa; u r~…ĺiwan tu kar~…ĺabian a kan…ôn tu sakatusa nu d…ômiadan, imi sa " samińßmińß ¶aan sa sir~…ĺiwan". ***: ".
